hooks.command: bash -c '[[ "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" == *".claude/worktrees/"* || -n "$ORCA_WORKTREE_ID" ]] || exit 0; [ -L "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/typescript" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm install --prefer-offline'

bash -c 'PORT=$(node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/worktree-port.mjs"); echo "Dev server port for this worktree: $PORT. The app runs at http://localhost:$PORT — pnpm dev and pnpm test:e2e use this port automatically. Use this URL for any Playwright or browser navigation."'
bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command) && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\bnpm\b|\bnpx\b"; then echo "Use pnpm/pnpx instead of npm/npx. This project uses pnpm." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty") && if [ -n "$FILE" ] && basename "$FILE" | grep -qE "^\.env(\.|$)"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Reading .env files is not allowed\"}}"; fi'
